name_en: 🆕【 M31071 Water Ripple 】This horizontal Zippy wallet is made of Monogram Eclipse canvas with a bronze metallic tone. Inspired by the traditional vertical Zippy wallet, it features a horizontal orientation for improved practicality. The fully zippered wallet design includes a main compartment with a zippered central wallet, six card slots on each side, and two flat pockets for bills. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10 cm C
